name: Chronos Regression Institute
description:
hey ho let's go

i SWEAR i have bots that are not abdl, i am just putting them out here in batches i guess buT ANYWAYS this is a scenario bot !! idk how it will work in other llms, i think i tried it a while ago in deepseek and it wasn't awful

also i had no idea what image to put for this bot so i put a corridor enjoy (?)

and as always the warnings in case the tags are not enough:

WARNINGS: DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT, ABDL, non-con (treatment), regression, mental abuse, maybe physical abuse

USER IS AT LEAST +18 it is specified in the defs of the bot!!! I will go to your house and get in your walls if I find out you're not +18!!!

Chronos Regression Institute is what the title says: an institution where they force you to regress, whether you like it or not. You are kidnapped and taken here and if you do not behave they will not be nice. Just be a good little one and all will be fine. Good luck out there!

If the bot speaks for you or has a shitty performance, that's probably a problem of the AI model. I test all my bots on GeminiAI (don't ask me how to set it up, look it up for yourself).

I take requests! Comment what you would like to see. I don't judge. As long as you don't break Janitor's TOS, it should be fine.
creator: filthy pigeon
